meta.title: Get started
meta.description: Set up your job search and optional local scraper.

step1.label: Describe you Dream Job
step1.tip: The more detail you provide, the better our AI can match job opportunities to your interests.
step1.title: What are you looking for?
step1.description: Describe your ideal job and we'll generate search URLs across job boards for you.
step1.placeholder: e.g. I'm seeking a frontend React.js position at Cairo, Egypt, onsite
step1.generatingDescription: We're building search links for LinkedIn, Wuzzuf, Indeed and other boards. This may take a moment.
step1.generatingIdentityVerifiedDescription: Your basic details are confirmed. We’ll use them to tailor results to your profile.
step1.generatingFetchingSourcesDescription: We’re pulling in the most relevant job boards and sources based on your preferences.
step1.generatingFinalizingDashboardDescription: We’re organizing your personalized job search dashboard and links.

step2.title: Run scraper locally (Opt)
step2.description: For the best experience and results, you can run the scraper on your Windows PC. Download the app, add your token, and click Start scraping.
step2.boostDescription: Connect the desktop app to securely search across your own files and data sources.
step2.bullet1: Keep your data private on your machine.
step2.bullet2: Search documents, job descriptions, and notes faster.
step2.bullet3: Sync once, then let the AI do the heavy lifting.

step3.title: You're ready!
step3.description: Your job search is set up. Head to the jobs dashboard to see your listings.
